# PlexApmApiGetAssetStatusesItem

## Properties

Name | Type | Description | Notes
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**ReceivedISOTimestamp** | Pointer to **time.Time** | ISO Timestamp of the event | [optional] 
**ReceivedUnixTimestamp** | Pointer to **int64** | 13 digit UNIX timestamp of the event | [optional] 
**Source** | Pointer to **string** | Source of the event. &amp;quot;Complex Event Processor&amp;quot; in case of events generated by CEP | [optional] 
**GatewayId** | Pointer to **string** | Gateway Identifier. In case of events generated by Complex Event Processor, this will be the gateway identifier of the gateway that sent the numerical data which caused the event. | [optional] 
**Asset** | Pointer to **string** | If the asset has a name, the name is returned else the asset code is returned | [optional] 
**TagName** | Pointer to **string** | Tag Name | [optional] 
**TagAlias** | Pointer to **string** | Tag Alias | [optional] 
**EventType** | Pointer to **string** | Event Type - Problem, Abnormal etc. | [optional] 
**State** | Pointer to **string** | State of the event - True/False | [optional] 
**EventReason** | Pointer to **string** | Event Reason | [optional] 
**Severity** | Pointer to **string** | Severity of the event. High, Medium etc | [optional] 
**Quality** | Pointer to **string** | Quality of the event - Good/Bad | [optional]
